Design System
Logo Color Type Components Imagery Voice
Brand Guidelines · v1.0

Forged for the close cut.

The visual system for Nordic Barber Shop — built on the discipline of a Viking edge: precise, angular, unhurried. Black is the steel, gold is the sharpened line.

Est. lockup · Helmet mark + wordmark
01 — IDENTITY

The mark

One lockup, two ink colors. The Viking profile always leads the wordmark — never the reverse.

On Ink #101010Bone ink
On Bone #F7F4ECInk black

Usage rules

  • 01 Maintain clear space equal to the helmet's own height on all sides.
  • 02 Minimum digital width: 120px for the full lockup, 32px for the helmet mark alone.
  • 03 The helmet mark may run standalone as a favicon, stamp, or watermark — the wordmark may not.
  • 04 Always render in a single flat ink: bone or ink black. No gradients, no gold fills on the mark itself.

Don't

Rotate · Stretch · Recolor · Add effects
02 — PALETTE

Steel & gold

Five tones. Ink carries the room, gold marks what matters, bone gives it air to breathe.

Ink
#101010
Primary canvas. Every surface starts here.
Charcoal
#1A1A1A
Elevated surfaces — cards, panels, input fields.
Nordic Gold
#E8B324
The one accent. CTAs, tags, rules, price points. Use it like a blade — sparingly, with intent.
Gold, Deep
#A9760A
Hover/pressed states and hairline borders where full gold is too loud.
Bone
#F7F4EC
Primary text on ink, and the paper tone for print collateral.
03 — TYPOGRAPHY

Three voices

A struck headline, a hand-cut signature, and a calm working face for everything in between.

Display
Anton
Headlines, section titles, prices. Always uppercase, always tight. Carries the same struck, no-nonsense weight as the wordmark without competing with it.
Sharpened
Since Day One
Signature
Marker Script
Reserved for one accent phrase per layout — a promise, a call-out, a hand-finished detail. Sourced from the brand's own marker alphabet (see Title_Character_Map). Never used for body copy or long lines.
Fresh fade, guaranteed.
Body / UI
Poppins
Paragraphs, navigation, buttons, forms, schedules. Rounded geometry that echoes the "Barber Shop" wordmark. Regular for reading, Semibold/Bold for labels and UI.
Every chair, every cut, held to the same standard. Book online in under a minute, walk in whenever the light's on.
RoleSize / LineWeightSample
Display XL64–108px / 0.92Anton 400Nordic
Display L40–52px / 1.0Anton 400Fresh Fades
Display M26–32px / 1.05Anton 400Book Now
Signature28–48px / 1.3Marker scriptFriday's here
Body15–17px / 1.6Poppins 400Regular paragraph text
Label / Eyebrow11–12px / 1.3Poppins 700, +0.14emSection Label

05 — IMAGERY

Duotone, always

Photography runs high-contrast grayscale with a gold key-light. No color photography in brand contexts.

Portrait — chair-side
Detail — tools & hands
Interior — the shop
06 — SPACING

Rhythm

An 8px base unit. Sections breathe; components don't crowd each other.

8
16
24
40
64
96
140
07 — VOICE

How we talk

Confident, short, a little dry. We state the hours; we don't apologize for them.

Do

Lead with the specific: the cut, the hour, the price. Let the gold underline do the emphasis, not extra words.

Fresh fade, guaranteed.
Don't

Don't stack adjectives or oversell. If the wordmark is loud, the copy stays quiet.

The most amazing haircut experience ever!!
Nordic Barber Shop — Brand Design System v1.0
